title: feed.rs: essence().to_string() for starts_with check
description:
src/feed.rs line 110-112

content.content_type.as_ref().map(|m| m.essence().to_string()).unwrap_or_default() allocates a String that is only used for a starts_with("image/") check and then discarded. essence() returns &str; keeping it as &str (or using .unwrap_or("")) eliminates the allocation without changing semantics.

Impact: one transient String allocation per feed media item processed. Minor allocation idiom issue.
close_reason: Fixed: essence check uses as_str() without allocation
